headline: South Africa Eyes Crypto Tax Rules By Year-End

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: Binance Sees $1.2B Outflow Amid ETH Exodus Surge

article.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
article.summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

headline: Hormuz Oil Transit Drops 20% Via Oman Detour

article.title: Oil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-Turns
article.summary: Oil and gas shipping along a US-protected corridor in the Strait of Hormuz showed signs of recovering Sunday, a day after a batch of vessels performed unexplained U-turns and detours in the vital energy corridor.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Toward $53K Amid Rising Deposits
